steps.title: Spot the elaborative clause
steps.content: On the left side of the blank is an independent clause: divergent strategies [verb]. On the right is a whereas clause that elaborates by showing how the divergent strategies split geographically—one becoming dominant in Europe, the other among nomadic herders.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content: A colon introduces elaboration. Emerged: correctly uses the colon to mark this boundary. Options A, B, and C—adding a conjunction, omitting punctuation, or using a comma—each fail to introduce the elaboration. That matches choice D — D is correct.
